calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Posting Bond
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Asis for petitioner Esther Li.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

Ms. Asis stated that petitioner Esther Li was the decedent's mother and requested her appointment as administrator. Ms. Asis represented that Ms. Li is a certified public accountant and has familiarity with the decedent's assets, which include interests in real property and business entities. Ms. Asis addressed the Court's concerns regarding priority of appointment, the size and complexity of the estate, and the interests of the decedent's minor children.

The Court discussed bonding requirements and expressed concern regarding waiver of bond. The Court indicated that appointment of an administrator would be conditioned upon the filing of an appropriate bond.

After discussion, the Court took the Petition for Letters of Administration under submission with the intent to grant, subject to the filing of an appropriate bond.

The Court set a status hearing for February 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, for status on posting of bond.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
